admin_path.reason: Admin panel path exposed in client-side JS

internal_api.reason: Internal API referenced in public JS — likely missing auth check

role_permission_mutation.reason: Role or permission mutation endpoint — BAC if not server-side validated

delete_user_resource.reason: DELETE on user/account resource — missing authz check = account takeover

http_method_sensitive.reason: Mutating HTTP method identified in JS — check for authz on server

bulk_operation.reason: Bulk mutation endpoint — frequently lacks per-item authorization

impersonation.reason: Impersonation endpoint — critical if accessible without proper authz

sensitive_config.reason: Config endpoint — may expose or accept sensitive values without authz

user_management.reason: User creation endpoint — check if requires admin role

export_endpoint.reason: Data export endpoint — BAC if user can export other users' data

me_endpoint.reason: /me endpoint returns authenticated user data — test with another user's token for BAC
